mission: Drive MeedyaConverter to v0.1.0 GA Direct-distribution release, then continuous improvement (security hardening, API/Swagger completeness, feature-gap closure within scope). App Store Lite path prepared but deferred.
aim: An Apple-first, feature-complete video/audio converter that ships v0.1.0 GA on the Direct channel as a signed/notarised/stapled DMG via GitHub Releases. Companion to the broader MeedyaSuite family (MeedyaSubtitler, MeedyaDL, MeedyaManager, MeedyaDB, MeedyaSuite-core).
definition_of_done: builds+runs from clean checkout (signed+notarised+stapled DMG mounts, drags to Applications, launches, completes a conversion end-to-end)
core user task works e2e — convert a video file from input format to output format via GUI and via CLI
tests cover core conversion flows and pass (967/967 currently green; safety net stays intact)
no High-impact correctness or UX backlog item — Low/Medium acceptable in PROJECT.md backlog
docs enough for a Direct-download user to install, verify signature, and run (README, in-app help, release notes)
every High-importance in-scope feature gap built-or-queued (#428 must-do list closed)
App Store Lite path preparation complete and clearly gated on user-side cert work
CLI API + OpenAPI/Swagger comprehensive and current
tag/branch strategy documented and applied; stale beta/alpha branches resolved

plan.mode: leveraged from prior audits (PROJECT_STATUS.md + #428 audit + 41 open issues)
iterate (Package.swift consolidation, remaining ship-blockers, App Store ITMS sweep)
plan.exit: no High correctness/test gap; #428 must-do list closed; App Store ITMS sweep complete
Phase-0 done; no unresolved Critical/High finding; rounds dry

plan.mode: iterate (UX/perf/dedup; var→let warnings; standing-task discipline backfill)

plan.exit: complete review pass: overall PASS @ last_commit + clean-room install integration check

next_action: POLISH Cycle 23 — first iterate-mode cycle in the POLISH phase. Pick ONE high-value item from the consolidated POLISH backlog. CANDIDATES (ordered by value × effort): (1) **Markdown cosmetic cleanup** of PROJECT.md + SECURITY.md — these have ~hundreds of MD060/MD032 table-style + list-spacing warnings accumulated since Cycle 1. A single pass adds spaces around the `|` pipes throughout. Pure mechanical change, no behaviour, no risk. (2) **var→let warnings**: 2 known sites in AnimatedImageGenerator.swift:167/178 (`pass1`/`pass2` never mutated). Tiny pass. (3) **F-010 G-015 SHA-pin sweep**: convert every `@v4` to its current 40-char SHA in `.github/workflows/*.yml` AND add `.github/dependabot.yml` for github-actions ecosystem AND wire `scripts/security-check-action-pins.sh` into a CI workflow as a required check (new tiny `security-check.yml`). Higher value than the cosmetic passes — closes a real residual security recommendation. (4) **F-002 POLISH-tier defensive migration** — push ~17 `appendingPathComponent` callsites through PathSanitizer even though they aren't currently exploitable. Defence-in-depth hardening. (5) **F-004 one-shot Keychain migration** on first launch — for users on a hypothetical upgrade path from before Cycle 16. Probably not load-bearing for v0.1.0 since there are no shipped pre-Cycle-16 builds. (6) **Standing-task discipline backfill** — milestone-tag closed issues, tick acceptance criteria, CHANGELOG sweep. **RECOMMENDED order**: (3) first (real security value), then (1) (visible cleanup that lets future readers focus), then (2) (5-minute lint), then (4) + (6) as time allows before the cap. (5) can stay queued unless an upgrade scenario surfaces. Each cycle picks ONE — don't batch.

queue.findings: SECURITY.md#Findings (not yet created; SECURE phase will populate)

gate_ledger.scope: out-of-scope for v0.1.0; tracked separately, Phase 9 milestone

gate_ledger.title: Subtitle sync via audio reference (3-4 weeks after #422 + #426)
Apple secrets verification (org-admin permissions required)
gate_ledger.notes: gh secret list on repo returned empty; org-level requires admin permissions Claude does not have. User to verify via https://github.com/organizations/MWBMPartners/settings/secrets/actions that the 6 secrets are present (APPLE_CERTIFICATE, APPLE_CERTIFICATE_PASSWORD, APPLE_SIGNING_IDENTITY containing 'Developer ID Application', APPLE_ID, APPLE_PASSWORD, APPLE_TEAM_ID)

gate_ledger.title: gh CLI auth refresh
gate_ledger.notes: gh auth expired ('HTTP 401: Bad credentials'); run `gh auth refresh -h github.com` interactively. Blocks new gh-API calls (issue triage, milestone reads, etc.) but does NOT block local code work.

gate_ledger.title: Sparkle Option A vs Option B decision for v0.1.0
gate_ledger.approval: user instructed both: A for v0.1.0 ship, B scaffolded for v0.2.0 readiness
gate_ledger.notes: A: GitHub-Releases poll + honest copy. B: full Sparkle wire-up + Cloudflare Worker. Per autopilot mission spec from the user this turn — both authorised.

gate_ledger.title: Tag strategy: trunk-based vs keep alpha/beta
gate_ledger.notes: beta/alpha branches are 60+ commits behind main since 2026-04-06. Inspection deferred until gh auth refresh.

gate_ledger.title: MeedyaSuite-core branch pin → tag pin migration
gate_ledger.notes: Per SECURITY.md F-009. Currently `branch: "main"` in Package.swift line 76. Gated behind SUITE_CORE=1 env var, not on v0.1.0 ship path. Swap to `from: "X.Y.Z"` once MeedyaSuite-core cuts a tagged release.

gate_ledger.title: GitHub Actions: SHA pin sweep + Dependabot config
gate_ledger.notes: Per SECURITY.md F-010. Convert every `@v4` to its 40-char SHA. Add `.github/dependabot.yml` with `package-ecosystem: github-actions`. Wire `scripts/security-check-action-pins.sh` into a CI workflow as a required check (new tiny `security-check.yml`). All POLISH-tier, no shipping blocker for v0.1.0.

notes.bootstrap: Cycle 1 = bootstrap. Adopted 8 ship-blocker commits from prior killed workflow wf_7bae08f4-b10 (cherry-picked the 6 already-committed branches + committed the 2 in-progress branches before cherry-picking). #428 must-do list is 8 of 13 items closed; remaining 5 are Package.swift consolidation, Sparkle A immediate, Apple-secrets fail-fast precheck in release.yml, end-to-end release.yml dry-run on a test tag, and decision items (tag strategy + Sparkle B activation).
notes.constraints: NEVER push without explicit user instruction. NEVER commit to main. NEVER force-push. NEVER modify .git/config. GitHub web UI for secrets (no `gh secret set`). UK English in user-facing docs. All commits reference issue numbers and include Co-Authored-By trailer. Cloudflare Worker deploy / EdDSA keypair / Apple cert acquisition / App Store Connect actions all require user action — document don't execute.
notes.gh_auth_status: expired as of 2026-06-30; refresh required before issue triage / milestone reads / gh-secret-list resume
